case_title: ELLEN TSANG VS. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED MAY-05-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $518.74 FILED BY TSANG, ELLEN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2017 - JUDGMENT.
